step2_rag_chunks: If someone offers you a cigarette, practice politely saying no and reminding yourself why you decided to quit.
If you slip and smoke a cigarette, it does not mean you have failed. Many people attempt quitting several times before succeeding.

Tell yourself you will smoke in 10 minutes if you still want to â€” and then do something else for those 10 minutes. Most of the time the urge has weakened significantly by the time the 10 minutes are up.

Patient: That one day doesn't matter. I can start again the next day. And the doctor said it's a long process, so I should be patient.

Patient: I think I might start feeling a little better. My breathing might not be as bad. And I might have more energy.
